subcodes.first_line: O ye loving friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! The very air resoundeth with joyous laughter from the fragrant garden of the All-Glorious, and souls, praised be God, are perfumed thereby [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران مهربان عبدالبهاء قهقهه از رائحه گلشن ابهی الحمد لله معطر است و نفوس
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
